revision.comment: Bot: create Islamic-calendar day stub
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Awwal 25''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 25th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Awwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 25 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Awwal]] [[ar:25 ربيع الأول]] [[ckb:٢٥ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]] [[fa:۲۵ ربیع‌الاول]] [[id:25 Rabiulawal]] [[pnb:25 ربیع الاول]] [[sd:25 ربيع الاول]] [[ur:25 ربیع الاول]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Awwal 25''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 25th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Awwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 25 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Awwal]] [[ar:25 ربيع الأول]] [[ckb:٢٥ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]] [[fa:۲۵ ربیع‌الاول]] [[id:25 Rabiulawal]] [[pnb:25 ربیع الاول]] [[sd:25 ربيع الاول]] [[ur:25 ربیع الاول]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Islamic Rabi' al-Awwal}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Awwal 25''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 25th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Awwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 25 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Awwal]] [[ar:25 ربيع الأول]] [[ckb:٢٥ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]] [[fa:۲۵ ربیع‌الاول]] [[id:25 Rabiulawal]] [[pnb:25 ربیع الاول]] [[sd:25 ربيع الاول]] [[ur:25 ربیع الاول]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Awwal 25''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 25th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Awwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 25 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Awwal]] [[ar:25 ربيع الأول]] [[ckb:٢٥ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]] [[fa:۲۵ ربیع‌الاول]] [[id:25 Rabiulawal]] [[pnb:25 ربیع الاول]] [[sd:25 ربيع الاول]] [[ur:25 ربیع الاول]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/4135853]])
revision.text:
{{Islamic Rabi' al-Awwal}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Rabi' al-Awwal 25''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 25th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Awwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 25 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Awwal]] [[ar:25 ربيع الأول]] [[ckb:٢٥ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]] [[fa:۲۵ ربیع‌الاول]] [[id:25 Rabiulawal]] [[pnb:25 ربیع الاول]] [[sd:25 ربيع الاول]] [[ur:25 ربیع الاول]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: add wikidata link from Indonesian interwiki (Q4121934)
working on the date checking
Moving from [[Category:Qq]] to [[Category:qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qqqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Unchecked Islamic Dates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qqqq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove incorrect Shona (sn:) interwiki links
Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:25 ربيع الأول]][[ckb:٢٥ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]][[fa:۲۵ ربیع‌الاول]][[id:25 Rabiulawal]][[ms:25 Rabiulawal]][[pnb:25 ربیع الاول]][[sd:25 ربيع الاول]][[ur:25 ربیع الاول]] {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} {{Islamic Rabi' al-Awwal}}
'''Rabi' al-Awwal 25''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 25th day of the month [[Rabi' al-Awwal]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 25 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Rabi' al-Awwal]] [[ar:25 ربيع الأول]] [[ckb:٢٥ی ڕەبیعولئەووەل]] [[fa:۲۵ ربیع‌الاول]] [[id:25 Rabiulawal]] [[pnb:25 ربیع الاول]] [[sd:25 ربيع الاول]] [[ur:25 ربیع الاول]] {{Islamic Calendar}} [[Category:wikidata linked Islamic Dates]] [[Category:wikidata linked Islamic Dates]]{{wikidata link|Q4121934}}
